patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female. Key diagnoses documented include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Labs from 07/03/2023 show elevated ferritin (266.8 ng/mL), low iron (41 ug/dL) with low iron saturation (15%), abnormal lipid panel with triglycerides 158 mg/dL and VLDL 32 mg/dL, and eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2. Recent care team includes primary care (Hand, Hoyet A, MD; Hershey, Curtis L, MD) and multiple specialists. Planned procedures/appointments include an ancillary procedure at LGH KISSEL HILL on 08/18/2025 and hematology follow-up on 04/21/2025. notable problem list items include postoperative/unclassified anemia and prior MRSA (R breast) and documented COVID-19 recovery. DOB conflict noted across sources.
